# Cold Call Reps

> Human cold outreach marketplace: AI-trained SDRs dial never-contacted leads to qualify or book appointments. Brands fund escrow and pay for verified results.

Cold calling is a numbers game for brands (volume of first-touch dials). For SDRs it is skill, speed, and consistency — with no hard earning ceiling on outcome pay.

## Product

- AI voice trainer + live coach for gatekeeper / decision-maker practice
- Quality-gated applications to brand campaigns
- Dialer, booking attribution, AI claim audit, Stripe Connect payouts
- Campaign outcomes: per booked meeting, per qualified lead, tiered accelerator
- Optional base pay: weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly (stacks with outcome pay)
- Platform fee: 20%, capped at $30 per outcome and $40/wk · $75/bi-weekly · $150/mo on base

## Who it is for

- Brands / founders: post campaigns; humans call Maps-scale / outbound lists with no prior email or LinkedIn touch; pay for qualify or book (not the close)
- SDRs / appointment setters: train, apply, get paid for results (global signup including PH and remote)

- https://coldcallreps.com/

## Guides

Task-focused guides. Claims trace to product source and the platform fee policy (20%, capped at $30/outcome and $40/wk · $75/bi-weekly · $150/mo on base). Humans dial live; AI is practice and claim audit only.

- https://coldcallreps.com/guides — guides hub (browse by brand hire, rep earn, trust & mechanics)
- https://coldcallreps.com/guides/hire-cold-callers — hire humans for first-touch dials with outcome-based pay
- https://coldcallreps.com/guides/cold-calling-gigs — find paid cold calling campaigns online
- https://coldcallreps.com/guides/campaign-escrow-and-claims — how brand escrow, claim audit, and disputes work
- https://coldcallreps.com/guides/platform-fees-and-payouts — the 20% fee, caps, and Stripe payouts explained
- https://coldcallreps.com/guides/pay-per-appointment-setting — when pay-per-meeting beats salaried SDRs
- https://coldcallreps.com/guides/get-paid-per-meeting-cold-calling — how reps earn on booked meetings and qualified leads
- https://coldcallreps.com/guides/how-campaigns-work — end-to-end lifecycle: post → apply → dial → claim → payout
- https://coldcallreps.com/guides/ai-cold-call-practice — AI voice practice before live human dials
- https://coldcallreps.com/guides/appointment-setting-marketplace — what an appointment-setting marketplace is
- https://coldcallreps.com/guides/hire-outbound-without-in-house-sdr — run outbound without a full-time SDR hire
- https://coldcallreps.com/guides/cold-call-reps-vs-outbound-agency — marketplace vs outbound agency comparison
- https://coldcallreps.com/guides/sdr-applications-and-approval — how rep applications, quality gate, and access work

## Out of scope (by design)

- Closing / closer compensation (separate from book-or-qualify)
- AI voice agents placing live brand calls (humans dial; AI coaches practice)

## Contact

- https://coldcallreps.com/sign-up
- support@coldcallreps.com
